mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_NO, USER_NAME, PROVIDER, CREATED_AT, AUTH, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{displayName}, 'KAKAO', SYSDATE, 2, 'ACTIVE' )
INSERT INTO USER_SOCIAL ( SOCIAL_NO, PROVIDER_ID, CREATED_AT, USER_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_USER_SOCIAL.NEXTVAL, #{providerId}, SYSDATE, #{userNo} )
